Container.Name: WiiM-Dashboard
Container.Overview: A self-hosted, dark-themed web dashboard to monitor and control your WiiM (LinkPlay) audio devices — now playing, EQ, sub-out, source/output switching, presets and more. It runs on your Unraid server and talks to the device over your LAN; it never modifies the device itself. After it starts: open the WebUI, create your admin login, then add your WiiM by its IP address.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port that maps to the container's internal port 3000 for the dashboard web UI.

Config.Name: AUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: REQUIRED. A long random secret (30+ characters) that signs login sessions. Just mash the keyboard for 30+ random characters — or generate one with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: COOKIE_SECURE
Config.Description: Keep false for plain-http access on your LAN (the Unraid default). Set to true only when serving the app over HTTPS through a reverse proxy, so login cookies are marked Secure.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database and runtime data. The container fixes ownership automatically on start, so a normal appdata path works.
